hero_clip.subject: person training alone in a dim gym at night
hero_clip.description: moody handheld footage, chalk dust, heavy lifts, empty gym, late-night grind

raw_text: {"quote": "It's not \"just luck\". If you put in the work. To get there. Luck is just. A combination of hard work. And good timing. So… don't allow anyone. To diminish your hard work."}

output.quote: It's not "just luck". If you put in the work. To get there. Luck is just. A combination of hard work. And good timing. So… don't allow anyone. To diminish your hard work.

meta.case: The approved rhythm-mode demo quote, pinned verbatim. 10.4s video → target 8 sentences; the quote splits into 9 on [.!?…] ('So…' ends its own 1-word sentence), inside the 4-9 band. 33 total words, every sentence 1-6 words, exactly one quoted span ('just luck'), ends with terminal punctuation. First-person no-excuses voice coheres with the discipline persona while staying grounded in the solo-gym footage.
